name: design-haven-build-site
description: Static website and Vercel functions for Design Haven Build.

scripts.check: node --check api/_mission-control.js && node --check api/support-ticket.js && node --check api/admin-login.js && node --check api/admin-session.js && node --check js/admin-dashboard.js && node --check js/website-helper-agent.js && node --check js/app.js
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static site build: no bundled assets required.')"
